programs.title: Home and Away
programs.desc: Justin runs into Bree and Remi, desperate to get a message to Theo. Remi agrees, as long as Justin shows up to help Kirby through her songwriting stumbles and Justin agrees.

programs.title: Highway Patrol
programs.desc: A car thief is hitting speeds of 190 kilometres per hour and police need to catch him before he reaches a school zone just as class is getting out. A golfer rides the streets in his golf buggy.

programs.title: Motorway Patrol
programs.desc: Street racers reach 192km/h. Hot and bothered with a van full of flames. A breakdown causes chaos in the Waterview Tunnel.
